data.title: B2B distributor Sonepar plugs $11.9 billion in annual digital sales
data.description: Digital sales now represent more than one-third of Sonepar’s total annual revenue of €32.5 billion ($35.3 billion USD).

data.title: Resideo bets big on ecommerce
data.description: In 2024, Resideo wholesale arm ADI Global’s ecommerce revenue grew 22% year-over-year, hitting an all-time high in daily digital sales.

data.title: Amazon tests Interests, an AI-powered discovery feature for shoppers
data.description: Interests follows an ecommerce trend of other AI launches from Amazon, including Alexa+ features, Amelia and Rufus.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: The best technology investments online retailers say they've made
data.description: New survey results about ecommerce technology planning show what's helping retailers to convert in and what they consider to be their best investments of 2024.

data.title: Best Buy plugs in new launch details for its forthcoming marketplace
data.description: The new U.S. marketplace is designed not just to offer more electronics, but also to expand into complementary and adjacent product categories like health and wellness, phone accessories, and home theater add-ons.
